title: Practice Menu Tacit Sensory Preview
goal: Expose existing tacit sensory fields as compact text-first preview tags in /practice/menu/:menuId using the already-fetched PracticeMenuBundle, without changing practice store/runtime/query/admin boundaries or expanding into media URL handling.
constraints: Keep src/stores/practiceStore.ts, src/lib/practice/runtime.ts, src/lib/practice/queries.ts, src/types/practice.ts, src/lib/practice/sessionView.ts, router, sim pages, and admin flows unchanged unless a blocker is proven from code
Keep src/lib/practice/menuView.ts bundle-only and do not import session-state helpers or PracticeSessionPage-local rendering helpers

Limit this task to compact sensory preview sourced from existing non-media tacit item fields; defer tacit media preview, signed/private URL handling, PracticePage card preview, runtime/store derived promotion, debug console work, and admin authoring
Preserve the existing expandable browse interaction, body text preview, and safe start-session CTA on PracticeMenuPage
No any, as any, ts-ignore, eslint-disable, admin/game cross-import, display:none, or inline filter/map inside Zustand selectors
Reuse existing gameVariables.css tokens first and keep PracticePlaceholder.module.css changes additive under browse-prefixed classes
No extra changes outside the approved write set and the session-start dirty snapshot baseline
acceptance: A pure menu browse helper can derive stable per-tacit sensory preview tags from existing PracticeMenuBundle.tacit_items while preserving display_step_no and sort_order ordering
The helper exposes only non-null sensory fields in a deterministic field order and keeps media-type tacit items excluded from the browse preview
PracticeMenuPage keeps the existing menu details, step-group expand/collapse UI, text body preview, and start-session CTA, and adds sensory tags only when a tacit item has sensory data
If a tacit item has no sensory fields, the UI omits the sensory row cleanly without broken spacing or placeholder text
Queries, types, practiceStore, runtime, sessionView, PracticePage, sim routes/pages, and PracticeAdminPage remain behaviorally unchanged

npx vitest run src/lib/practice/__tests__/menuView.test.ts, npx tsc --noEmit, npm run build, and npm run lint complete with no new warnings/errors beyond the pre-existing warning at src/hooks/useGameTick.ts:73 and the pre-existing non-blocking Vite chunk warning
